description_long: This is a circular, stone or concrete fountain with a two-tiered design, featuring a central cylindrical column surrounded by a raised basin. The fountain sits on a rectangular base with a striped pattern, possibly indicating decorative paving or tiling. The central column has small circular openings, likely for water flow, and the upper tier is slightly elevated above the main basin. The structure appears weathered, with some discoloration and minor surface imperfections, suggesting outdoor urban use. There are no visible water features or elaborate sculptural elements, giving the fountain a utilitarian and minimalist appearance. The surrounding area is flat, with no visible landscaping or additional amenities.
description: A circular, two-tiered stone or concrete fountain with a central column and striped rectangular base, showing a minimalist and utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the central column and both tiers clearly, with the striped base most visible on the right side.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the left side of the fountain and the striped base, with the central column and basin still prominent.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the central column and the full circular basin, with the striped base extending to the left.
description_view_3: This side view emphasizes the left edge of the fountain and the striped base, with the central column partially obscured.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain is plain and functional, with no visible decorative motifs, engravings, or sculptural embellishments. Its design is minimalist, focusing on geometric forms and simple lines.
attribute_basin_structure: The basin is circular and tiered, with a raised rim and a central cylindrical column. There are no visible compartments or divisions, and the rim is plain and unadorned.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: No visible water jets or spray patterns are present on the fountain.
